title: Sprachliches Bewusstsein in der Hebräischen Bibel und in der rabbinischen Literatur | Linguistic Awareness in the Hebrew Bible and the Rabbinic Literature
further_info: Recommended Reading M. L. Chan, Language Consciousness in the Hebrew Bible during the Persian Period in Jerusalem. Los Angeles 2019. W. F.
